# OperateAI

> OperateAI gets Perth local-service businesses found, recommended and booked by AI. When someone asks ChatGPT, Gemini or Google's AI for a good local business, it names two or three — we get you onto that shortlist and keep you there. Voice: plain-English, Australian. Area served: Perth, Western Australia.

## Start here
- [Free AI Visibility Check](https://operateai.com.au/check/): Free, by-hand check of what AI says about your business and the one thing costing you customers.

## Services
- [Done-for-you](https://operateai.com.au/done-for-you/): Always-on AI visibility — we monitor, fix and hold your AI presence and send proof of the work. From A$490/mo.
- [Websites](https://operateai.com.au/websites/): Websites built AI-readable so ChatGPT, Gemini and Google's AI can read your services and recommend you. Fixed-price packages from A$849 (50% deposit to start).
- [iOAgent](https://operateai.com.au/ioagent/): Custom-built, always-on AI agents that do the repetitive work (enquiries, follow-ups, back-office). Monthly plans from A$999/mo, unlimited usage, you approve before they act.

## Learn
- [How it works](https://operateai.com.au/how-it-works/): How AI decides which local business to recommend, and what we fix.
- [Articles](https://operateai.com.au/articles/): Guides on getting found and recommended by AI.
- [About](https://operateai.com.au/about/): Who we are and how we work.
- [AI visibility by trade & suburb](https://operateai.com.au/ai-visibility/): How Perth trades get recommended by AI, by trade and suburb.
